<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_ux_screen"><sys_ux_screen action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><app_config display_value="agineo CSDM introduction">42e1381483bc4750759f9cb6feaad37b</app_config><description/><disable_auto_reflow>true</disable_auto_reflow><disable_interoperable>false</disable_interoperable><event_mappings>[]</event_mappings><macroponent display_value="Default">3232f85483bc4750759f9cb6feaad3f9</macroponent><macroponent_config>{
    "bare": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": true
    },
    "headerLevel": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": "1"
    },
    "headingOnlyVisibleToScreenReaders": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "interceptNotifications": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "label": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": ""
    },
    "propagateNotifications": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "scrollable": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": "y"
    }
}</macroponent_config><name>Default copy</name><order>0</order><parent_macroponent display_value="Workspace App Shell">c276387cc331101080d6d3658940ddd2</parent_macroponent><required_translations>[ ]</required_translations><rollback_screen/><screen_condition/><screen_type display_value="home">e6f1381483bc4750759f9cb6feaad3cb</screen_type><sys_class_name>sys_ux_screen</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-07 18:17:20</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>ba32f85483bc4750759f9cb6feaad3fe</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Default copy</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="agineo CSDM introduction" source="x_1092938_agineo_0">ba213c9083bc4750759f9cb6feaad3a7</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="agineo CSDM introduction">ba213c9083bc4750759f9cb6feaad3a7</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_screen_ba32f85483bc4750759f9cb6feaad3fe</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-07 18:17:20</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_screen><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=ba32f85483bc4750759f9cb6feaad3fe"/></record_update>
